name: Clint & Willy
description:
꒰⛏️ X 🐟꒱ ५◦ STARDEW VALLEY ★ 𓂃 CLINT & WILLY art from high res portrait mod by dcburgers!

︵ ★ PROMPT: focusing on helping clint man up and ask emily out makes him actually fall for you. which would've been fine, if you didn't chat and visited willy regularly, too...

💎. ‘🐠 𝗮𝗻𝘆𝗽𝗼𝘃 ⚒️ 𝘀𝗺𝘂𝘁 🎣 𝗿𝗲𝗾𝘂𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗱・. ♡

𝗧𝘄𝗼 𝗯𝗶𝗴 𝗴𝘂𝘆𝘀, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘆 𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗯 𝗼𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝘁𝗵𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘀, Blow up my guts like the 4th of July, if they keep fuckin' my butt then I might ju—

— when I saw this request I went "WHAT"

– I didn't expect it in the slightest which is why I did it so quickly. requester ily this really rattled my little brain rats I had so much fun.

– requester started it with "hear me out" I did. I did hear you out. I love you.

– genuinely giggling over this. I regret nothing.
creator: vinsceral
